calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Exparte Application For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney John P. Zanghi for Caritas Managaement Corporation the moving party/ Defendant Jeremiah Lowery the opposing party.

Hearing Held.
Witness:
1)Hugo Sandoval (DOB:06/07/80) at 2:55pm
2)Liduvina DeJesus Mejia (DOB:04/27/65) at 3:10pm
3)Alford Degroat (DOB:03/05/71) at 3:53pm
4)Jeremiah Lowery (DOB:04/22/86) at 4:04pm

Exhibits:
Plaintiff's
1) 2 8x10 pages with photos (black and white from survellance camera on 12-17-13) back alley of Dore street. (Marked and Admitted)
2) 2 8x10 pages with photos (black and white from survellance camera on 12-17-13) front lobby Witness Mejia leaving the building (time stamped 5:20:03 and 5:21:15). (Marked and Stamped)
3) 5 8x10 pages with photos (black and white from survellance camera on 12-17-13) front of building of defendant (time stamped 5:41 through 5:48:34) (Marked and Admitted)
4) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's side of face (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
5) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's side of face, showing a bruise (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
6) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's leg, showing a bruise (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
7) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's leg, showing a bruise (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
8) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's entire leg, showing a bruise (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
9) 3x5 color photo of Mejia's hand, showing injury (hospital) taken on 12/17/13 (Marked and Admitted)
After hearing arguments from both parties in this matter. The Court's Ruling is as follows;
The Court concludes that Mr. Lowery did assault Miss Mejia and his conduct has violated the stipulation that was in place as of December 26, 2012. Exhibits are returned to Plaintiff's counsel. Mr. Zanghi has agreed to accept the exhibits and will not alter them in any way. Order signed and Judgment filed in open court. Judge Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
